One login. Every client.

Built for agencies managing 10-50 brands, not just one.

Multi-client workspaces

Switch between every brand you manage from one dashboard, with an aggregate portfolio visibility view.

White-label reports

Weekly PDF reports carrying your agency logo, ready to forward to clients without edits.

Pitch mode

Generate a free lite audit for any prospect — no site access needed — and win the room before the contract.

Seats & roles

Bulk seat management with role-based permissions, so juniors report and leads approve.

Retainer-ready

Turn AEO into a recurring line item with deliverables your clients can actually see moving.

Margin-friendly ₹ pricing

Agency plans priced for Indian retainers, so every client you add improves your margin.

The agency workflow, covered.

Pitch

Win new business with data the prospect has never seen.

  • Free lite audits, no site access
  • Branded proposal exports
  • Competitor gap snapshots
  • Hindi & English coverage

Manage

Run every client from a single, fast workspace.

  • Client switcher & portfolio view
  • Role-based permissions
  • Bulk prompt management
  • Per-client billing tags

Report

Prove value weekly without lifting a finger.

  • White-label PDF reports
  • Top 5 opportunities digest
  • Slack & WhatsApp alerts
  • Revenue attribution views

Up and running in a week.

  1. 1

    Connect your clients

    Add each client's brand, domain and competitors. We auto-suggest 20-30 starter prompts per client in English and Hindi.

  2. 2

    First run overnight

    Nightly visibility runs populate every client dashboard before your morning standup — never an empty screen.

  3. 3

    Pitch with audits

    Generate a free lite audit for any prospect without site access, branded with your agency logo.

  4. 4

    Report on autopilot

    White-label PDF reports every week, per client, ready to forward. Alerts hit Slack or WhatsApp when visibility drops.

Built different, on purpose.

FeatureAnsarAEOGlobal Tool AGlobal Tool B
Native Hindi & Hinglish prompt tracking
SMB pricing in ₹ (from ₹1,999/mo)
Auto-Fix with one-click CMS deploy
Revenue attribution (GA4 + Razorpay)
WhatsApp visibility alerts
Agency white-label reports
One-click cancel, no dark patterns

Operators agree.

Frequently asked questions

Everything about coverage, plans and how the platform works.

ChatGPT, Perplexity and Gemini today, with Claude, Grok and India-relevant models like DeepSeek on the roadmap.
